faqs.question: What causes drain flies in Murray Hill apartments and buildings?
faqs.answer: Drain flies breed in the organic matter that builds up inside drains, pipes, and sewage systems. In Murray Hill's older buildings, aging plumbing and inadequate drain maintenance create ideal breeding conditions. They're commonly found in bathroom drains, kitchen sinks, basement floor drains, and commercial food service areas.

faqs.question: How much does drain fly treatment cost in Murray Hill?
faqs.answer: Drain fly treatment in Murray Hill typically costs between $350 and $550, depending on the severity of the infestation, the number of affected drains, and the size of your property. We provide free inspections and upfront pricing before beginning any treatment.

faqs.question: How long does it take to eliminate drain flies?
faqs.answer: Most drain fly infestations can be eliminated within 1-2 weeks with proper treatment. Our process includes identifying all breeding sites, thorough drain cleaning, application of bio-enzymatic treatments, and follow-up inspections to ensure complete elimination. Severe infestations in multi-unit buildings may require additional treatments.

faqs.question: Do you service both residential and commercial properties in Murray Hill?
faqs.answer: Yes, we provide drain fly treatment for all property types in Murray Hill, including apartments, co-ops, condos, townhouses, restaurants, hotels, office buildings, and retail spaces. We work with property managers, building supers, and individual residents to address drain fly problems quickly and discreetly.
